x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or entity whose funds are being blocked or restricted for a specific purpose.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bank
x-enumeration-literals.description: The bank that places and manages the block on the account, ensuring the specified amount cannot be used until released.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Government or official bodies that oversee banking operations and ensure the block is legally enforceable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description: The person or organization for whom the blocked amount is reserved or secured (e.g., merchant, lender, or counterparty).
